# One Africa Capital
## “our spirit animal reflects our approach to investing”
One Africa Capital is an African woman owned and managed private equity investment company. The firm was established to mobilize impactful growth and replacement capital to South African businesses with highly competent management teams and unique business propositions in the Small and Medium Enterprise (“SME”) space. With a keen emphasis on enabling positive sustainable growth and social impact, OAC focuses on generating attractive risk-adjusted financial returns while promoting transformation, gender inclusion and diversity.
One Africa Capital is an authorized Financial Services Provider under OACP (Pty) Ltd license number 51740
## What we Do
![Women owned private equity funds ONE AFRICA CAPITAL](https://oneafricacapital.co.za/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/Women-owned-private-equity-funds-ONE-AFRICA-CAPITAL-01-04.jpg)
## Invest
## ONE AFRICA
We are One in Africa and our strength lies in harnessing our pooled resources to compete across the global economy.
![Women owned private equity funds IN SOUTH AFRICA ONE AFRICA CAPITAL PARTNER](https://oneafricacapital.co.za/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/Women-owned-private-equity-funds-IN-SOUTH-AFRICA-ONE-AFRICA-CAPITAL-PARTNER-04.jpg)
## Partner
## ONE VISION
We aim to partner with South African based companies and seek to build diverse, innovative Pan-African businesses.
![BEE private equity - ONE AFRICA CAPITAL](https://oneafricacapital.co.za/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/BEE-private-equity-ONE-AFRICA-CAPITAL-04.jpg)
## Grow
## ONE GOAL
Our goal is to deploy capital into high impact investments that contribute to triple bottom-line returns:
• Human capital
• Social capital
• Financial capital
### Our passion lies across five key elements:
**1. Investing in SA businesses** which are well positioned to expand into the African continent where there is a multitude of growth opportunities
**2. Gender equality and diversity** in the businesses that we invest in
**3. Building a high performance culture** which accommodates diversity while delivering expected financial returns
**4. Making a positive impact** in terms of economic growth and job creation
**5. Being a role model for African women** by showcasing our success in a male denominated, untransformed PE industry
## YOUR VISION – OUR PASSION
### “We aim to build a diversified portfolio across various high impact industries which are scalable locally & in the Rest of Africa”
![USAID logo](https://oneafricacapital.co.za/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/USAID-logo.png)
One Africa Capital has been selected to participate in a USAID funded program for Southern-African Women Fund Managers aimed at funding and empowering females in private equity. In association with MIDA advisors and SAVCA.
[www.savca.co.za](http://www.savca.co.za/)
### Address
Bryanston, Johannesburg, 2191, South Africa
### Email
info@oneafricacapital.co.za

tavily.answer:
Africa Investment Capital Partners' official website is https://oneafricacapital.co.za. They focus on women-owned private equity in South Africa and aim for triple bottom-line returns.
Africa Investment Capital Partners focuses on private equity investments in small to medium-sized companies across Africa. The firm aims to capitalize on high potential returns due to limited capital availability in the region. Established to exploit overlooked investment opportunities in Africa.
Africa Investment Capital Partners is a private equity firm focused on investments in Africa. It invests in technology and growth-oriented companies. The firm is based in Amsterdam.
Africa Investment Capital Partners is a firm focused on providing financial services and advisory, while Wellfound is a platform connecting startups with job opportunities, funded by investors like Google Ventures.
Africa Investment Capital Partners' Dealroom connects African enterprises with investors, facilitating cross-border investment and trade. It was launched in 2019 and raised $7M in 2026 for global expansion. The platform focuses on curated, high-quality investment opportunities.

tagline: We aim to build a diversified portfolio across various high impact industries which are scalable locally & in the Rest of Africa
